title: Dactimala oliviformis
uses: Dactylanthus hallii, not Dactimala oliviformis, is a unique plant species known for its unique flower.  Dactylanthus hallii  is not actually found in the wild, but is found on the mistletoe of the New Zealand tree Hoheria populnea.
